name: CMP_SALARY_SIMPLE_COMPNTS_
description: Child entity for salary simple rates defined for salary record

columns.Name: SIMPLE_SALARY_COMPNT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary unique indentifier

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person unique ID

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Person Assignment unique ID

columns.Name: SALARY_ID
columns.Comments: Salary unique ID

columns.Name: SALARY_BASIS_ID
columns.Comments: Salary Basis unique ID

columns.Name: SALARY_DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Salary Start Date

columns.Name: SALARY_DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Salary End Date

columns.Name: BASIS_SIMPLE_COMPONENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique key of setup entity cmp_basis_simple_components

columns.Name: DISPLAY_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Display sequence will be used display in ascending order

columns.Name: PROCESSING_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Processing order of the rates user entered will usually be first and then computed rates

columns.Name: COMPONENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Simple Rate type as defined in the salary basis

columns.Name: COMPONENT_CODE
columns.Comments: Rate component code which is user defined lookup code

columns.Name: BASED_ON_COMPONENT_CODE
columns.Comments: If Rate is percentage based then the rate on which the amount will be computed during allocation time.

columns.Name: OVERALL_SALARY_AFFECT
columns.Comments: If the rate amount would be added to the overall salary rate if present in the salary basis definition.

columns.Name: INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: Input Value Id of the element type attached to salary basis to which the element entry will be created.

columns.Name: USER_SELECTED_COMPONENT
columns.Comments: If the simple rate is a user selected one from the salary basis which are defined as user selectable at allocation time

columns.Name: DEFAULT_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Default Amount if defined in the setup for the simple rate

columns.Name: PREV_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Pervious component amount for the same salary basis

columns.Name: PREV_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Previous Adjustment Amount for the component for the same salary basis, it will be null for first salary record.

columns.Name: PREV_ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT
columns.Comments: Previous Adjustment Percentage for the component of the same salary basis.

columns.Name: AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Rate Amount which can be user entered or computed

columns.Name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Currency Code as defined in the salary basis

columns.Name: FREQUENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Frequency as defined in the salary basis

columns.Name: SCALE
columns.Comments: Rate number of decimal points as defined in the salary basis

columns.Name: ROUNDING_CODE
columns.Comments: Rounding Code as defined in the salary basis

columns.Name: ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Adjustment Amount with respect to previous salary record provided it also has the same basis and simple rate

columns.Name: ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT
columns.Comments: Adjustment Percent with respect to previous salary record provided it also has the same basis and simple rate

columns.Name: PERCENTAGE
columns.Comments: Rate Percentage user entered or fixed

columns.Name: ANNUAL_FACTOR
columns.Comments: Annual Factor as defined in salary basis

columns.Name: ANNUAL_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Annual Amount with FTE applied

columns.Name: ANNUAL_FT_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Annual Amount without the FTE applied i.e. full-time amount

columns.Name: MINIMUM_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Minimum check for the Rate Amount entered or computed.

columns.Name: MAXIMUM_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Maximum check for the Rate Amount entered or computed.

columns.Name: OVERRIDE_GSP_RATE
columns.Comments: OVERRIDE_GSP_RATE

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
